category_sources: source_facts.description says CppCMS is a high-performance web development framework; official wiki describes it as a C++ web framework for web applications and services.
display_name_sources: Official CppCMS wiki and repository README use the display name CppCMS.
docs_sources: Official CppCMS wiki main page links framework documentation; CppCMS 1.x page contains installation, tutorials, reference, and concepts documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/artyom-beilis/cppcms, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official wiki identify CppCMS as a C++ web development framework for high-load web sites and services.
